notes: Sources are intentionally explicit so the daily run is auditable.
LinkedIn is included through public company/person pages and search queries. Its logged-in feed is not treated as a dependable API.
Direct read/view counts are often unavailable. Ranking uses visible engagement, source reach, trending prominence, and cross-source coverage.

sources.name: Google News AI
sources.query: (AI OR "artificial intelligence" OR OpenAI OR Anthropic OR "Google DeepMind" OR "Meta AI") when:1d

sources.name: Google News AI Payments and Agent Commerce
sources.query: (OpenAI OR ChatGPT OR Visa OR Mastercard OR Stripe OR PayPal) ("AI agent" OR "agentic commerce" OR "AI payments" OR "agent payments" OR checkout OR wallet OR "payment system") when:2d

sources.name: Google News Frontier AI Policy and Access
sources.query: (Anthropic OR Claude OR OpenAI OR Microsoft OR "Dario Amodei") (regulation OR "data terms" OR "employee access" OR policy OR safety OR Washington) when:2d

sources.name: Curated AI Newsletter Discovery
sources.query: ("Generative AI Daily Newsletter" OR "AI newsletter" OR "The Rundown AI" OR "Ben's Bites" OR "Superhuman AI" OR "Import AI") (OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Claude OR ChatGPT OR "AI agent") when:2d

sources.name: Siemens Simcenter AI Search
sources.query: site:blogs.sw.siemens.com/simcenter (AI OR "machine learning" OR "neural operator" OR "surrogate model" OR "reduced order" OR CFD OR CAE OR simulation) when:30d

sources.name: Siemens Art of the Possible CAE AI Search
sources.query: site:blogs.sw.siemens.com/art-of-the-possible ("industrial CAE" OR simulation OR "machine learning" OR AI OR "geometric deep learning") when:60d

sources.name: Ansys SimAI Search
sources.query: ("Ansys SimAI" OR "Ansys AI" OR "GeomAI") (simulation OR CAE OR CFD OR FEA OR engineering) when:30d

sources.name: Rescale AI Physics Search
sources.query: (Rescale OR "AI Physics" OR "agentic engineering") (simulation OR CAE OR CFD OR engineering) when:30d

sources.name: Monolith AI Engineering Search
sources.query: ("Monolith AI" OR monolithai) (engineering OR simulation OR physics OR CAE OR surrogate) when:30d

sources.name: Neural Concept Engineering Search
sources.query: ("Neural Concept" OR "engineering intelligence") (CAE OR simulation OR design OR automotive OR aerospace) when:30d

sources.name: Google News CAE AI
sources.query: (CAE OR "computer-aided engineering" OR CFD OR FEA OR "engineering simulation") (AI OR "machine learning") when:7d

sources.name: Google News AI for Engineering
sources.query: ("AI for engineering" OR "surrogate model" OR "digital twin" OR "physics-informed neural network" OR "neural operator") when:7d

sources.name: Google News Simulation AI Use Cases
sources.query: (simulation OR "digital twin" OR CFD OR FEA) ("use case" OR deployment OR case study) AI when:14d

sources.name: NVIDIA CAE and Simulation Search
sources.query: site:developer.nvidia.com/blog (CAE OR simulation OR CFD OR digital twin OR surrogate model) AI

sources.name: LinkedIn CAE AI Public Posts
sources.query: site:linkedin.com/posts (CAE OR simulation OR CFD OR FEA OR digital twin OR surrogate model) (AI OR machine learning)

sources.name: LinkedIn AI for Engineering Public Posts
sources.query: site:linkedin.com/posts "AI for engineering" OR "engineering simulation" "AI"

sources.name: Engineering.com Design News Weekly
sources.query: site:engineering.com/category/technology/design (AI OR "artificial intelligence" OR CAD OR CAE OR simulation OR manufacturing OR "Solid Edge" OR Designcenter OR Siemens OR Autodesk OR PLM)

sources.name: Engineering.com Simulation News
sources.query: site:engineering.com/category/technology/simulation (AI OR "artificial intelligence" OR simulation OR CAE OR CFD OR FEA OR "digital twin" OR Siemens OR Simcenter OR surrogate)

sources.name: Design News
sources.query: site:designnews.com (AI OR CAD OR CAE OR simulation OR manufacturing OR automation OR robotics)

sources.name: Generative AI Newsletter
sources.query: site:genai.works (OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Claude OR ChatGPT OR "AI agent" OR "generative AI" OR "AI newsletter")

sources.name: Generative AI Newsletter Discovery
sources.query: ("Generative AI" OR genai.works OR "newsletter@genai.works") (OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Claude OR ChatGPT OR "AI agent" OR "generative AI") when:2d
